summary: Comprehensive H2H (Head-to-Head) feature testing completed for soccer app. All backend H2H endpoints working (100% success rate). Frontend H2H functionality fully operational with proper integration.

minor_bugs.issue: Console warnings about duplicate keys in component rendering
minor_bugs.details: React warns about non-unique keys which could cause rendering issues

data_display_issues.issue: Squad section shows jersey numbers but missing player names and positions
data_display_issues.details: API data may not include complete player information or needs better data fetching

passed_tests: H2H endpoint /api/h2h/{team1_id}/{team2_id} returns last 5 matches between teams
Team form endpoint /api/team-form/{team_id} returns last 5 matches for a team
Match detail page loads with H2H tab as default
H2H tab shows summary stats (wins, draws, total goals)
H2H tab shows previous meetings list with detailed match info
Home team form tab works and shows last 5 matches with W/L/D badges
Away team form tab works and shows last 5 matches with W/L/D badges
All backend API endpoints (16/16 tests passed)

minor_fixes: Fix React key prop warnings in component rendering
Improve team squad data fetching to include complete player information (names, positions)
